creator: k_mid@yahoo.co.jp
text:
'/usr/bin/window' command is executed with kterm, it will be core dump.
I tried it is 'ja-kterm-6.2.0_9'.

Fix: 

Don't patch 'kterm-6.2.0-termios-0.2.patch.gz'
How-To-Repeat: portinstall ja-kterm, and execute.
Type 'window' command in the terminal.
To be core dump (window.core).
